purpose: Define the exact safe execution sequence to use only after the owner approves MVP-02 adapted draft creation.
safe_approval_phrases: 批准进入 MVP-02 适配草案阶段
Approve MVP-02 adapted draft creation only

execution_sequence_after_approval.goal: Record the exact owner approval phrase and the bounded scope before creating any adapted draft.
must_verify: approval phrase matches the active safe approval phrase list
scope is limited to non-runtime adapted draft creation plus checklist-based review

execution_sequence_after_approval.goal: Create adapted draft material only under the declared non-runtime review surface.
must_verify: no files are written under skills/

execution_sequence_after_approval.goal: Create neutralized, agent-neutral, public-safe draft material for each selected candidate.
must_verify: private assumptions are removed or bounded
source attribution and license boundaries are preserved
upstream source text is not redistributed as approved curated payload
overlap with existing curated Skills and native/runtime capability is recorded

execution_sequence_after_approval.goal: Apply the MVP-02 adaptation review checklist to each adapted draft.
Run repository verification before any later release or routing gate.
Stop after adapted draft review evidence is recorded; do not proceed into release, routing, install, or publication.
must_verify: next required gate is explicitly recorded

still_disallowed_until_approval: install or sync live Agent environments
approve, release, or publish any candidate payload
redistribute upstream source text as approved curated payload
next_required_evidence_if_approved: explicit record that manifest, routing projection, and live install remain unchanged
